summary: On May 16, 2025, at approximately 1838 hours, Fairbanks AST responded to the area of Steelhead Road for a report of a disturbance involving firearms. Investigation revealed probable cause to arrest Alan Cleveland for assault in the second degree. Alan was remanded to FCC without incident.

title: SIWO Forecast – May 16, 2025
summary: Assessment of Current Ice Conditions Relevant to Distribution and Access of Walrus Click the name of each community below to view more frequently updated and detailed information from the National Weather Service. Synopsis : Mostly dry conditions with northerly flow across most of the Bering Sea are expected to last through most of the forecast time frame, with little in the way of notable temperature changes expected. No significant weather is anticipated over the next several days, but near the end of next week (the week of Friday, May 23), there is some indication that a low may move into the Bering Sea, although the location of this low, if it enters the Bering, is very low confidence. If the low enters the Bering Sea, there is a chance for increased south to southeast winds over St. Lawrence Island and the western Seward Peninsula. Near St. Lawrence Island Shorefast ice extends 0.5 mile (1 km) offshore of Gambell and Savoonga, and up to 5 miles (8 km) offshore between the two. Bet...

title: AST Warrant, Trespassing: Wasilla [AK25046880]
summary: On 05/16/2025 at approximately 1510 hours, Alaska State Troopers received a report of a Trespassing at Three Bears near Pittman Rd. in Wasilla. Investigation revealed that Crystal Churchill, had a lifetime trespass from all Three Bears properties in Alaska. Additionally, Crystal had two outstanding warrants for failure to appear for MISC5, and DWLR, Crystal was arrested her for the outstanding warrants and Trespassing in the second degree. Crystal was remanded at Matsu Pretrial and held on $250 bail for each of the warrants.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Request for Bids: Gill Nets and Ground Line
summary: Request for Bids: Gill Nets and Ground Line The Cordova Harbor is accepting sealed bids for six gill nets and one bag of ground line. title: AST DV A4: Palmer [AK25046632]
summary: On 05/16/2025 AST responded to reports of a disturbance in Palmer. Through investigation, AST determined that Nina Mccready, age 39, of Wasilla, had caused physical injury to a family member. She was arrested for DV A4 and transported to Mat-Su pretrial where she was held without bail.

title: AST Warrant Arrest, False Report: Fairbanks [AK25046616]
summary: On 05/16/2025 at 0135 hours a Trooper stopped a bicyclist for an equipment violation. The rider gave the Trooper a false name and date of birth. The Trooper ultimately identified her as Elizabeth Alexander. She was arrested for her Felony; No Bail Parole Violation warrant as well as False Report.
